query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS site_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  lockStartDate VARCHAR(16),
  lockDays INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 60,
  manualLockEnabled INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  lockMessage TEXT,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Insert the default row (id=1) if it doesn't exist
INSERT IGNORE INTO site_settings (id, lockDays, manualLockEnabled)
VALUES (1, 60, 0);
